column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a bright colourful bento box" | TEXT="お弁当" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Opening the bento with a smile" | TEXT="じゃーん！" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Offering an onigiri" | TEXT="どうぞ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Eating a tamagoyaki happily" | TEXT="美味しい！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping mouth with a napkin elegantly" | TEXT="ごちそうさま" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at an empty bento box" | TEXT="完食" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Patting full stomach gently" | TEXT="お腹いっぱい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking excited, pointing at bento" | TEXT="どれが好き？" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Pondering what to eat next with chopsticks" | TEXT="迷うなぁ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud with cooking utensils" | TEXT="私が作りました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="味見バッチリ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking worried holding a bento" | TEXT="お口に合うかな" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling with relief" | TEXT="よかった" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands nicely" | TEXT="いただきます" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Offering tea with the bento" | TEXT="お茶もどうぞ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Spreading a picnic mat" | TEXT="ここにしよ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting down elegantly on the mat" | TEXT="よっこいしょ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up at the cherry blossoms gently" | TEXT="最高だね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing contentedly" | TEXT="最高です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Laughing behind her hand" | TEXT="うふふ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Waving a friend over" | TEXT="こっちだよ！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised at a huge bento" | TEXT="すごい量" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Puffing cheeks, slightly mad" | TEXT="食べすぎ注意" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands defensively" | TEXT="もう食べられない" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Shaking head left and right" | TEXT="無理無理" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding enthusiastically" | TEXT="最高！" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a high five" | TEXT="イェイ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="遅れました" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply" | TEXT="お待たせ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands together in apology" | TEXT="ごめんなさい！" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking slightly shy" | TEXT="一緒にお弁当どう？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely" | TEXT="嬉しい" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Giggling happily" | TEXT="あはは" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing a chopstick playfully" | TEXT="それ狙ってる？" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Hiding bento playfully" | TEXT="あげないよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Giving the food playfully" | TEXT="あーん"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy after eating" | TEXT="眠くなってきた" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning gently" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching arms out" | TEXT="うーん" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Laying down on the picnic mat" | TEXT="ごろりん" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sleeping peacefully" | TEXT="すやすや" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting back up looking refreshed" | TEXT="ぱっちり" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Cleaning up the bento box" | TEXT="お片付け" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Carrying the bento cloth bundle" | TEXT="帰ろう" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back and smiling" | TEXT="また来ようね"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking warmly at friend" | TEXT="いつもありがとう" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hand out" | TEXT="手をつなごう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Walking side by side" | TEXT="楽しい" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up happily" | TEXT="最高の日" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye softly" | TEXT="バイバイ" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Blowing a kiss playfully" | TEXT="ちゅっ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Blushing furiously" | TEXT="恥ずかしい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Running away playfully" | TEXT="じゃあねん" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Turning around to wave again" | TEXT="また明日"
